name: Monkfish with Garlic and Herb Butter (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and stir in the finely chopped herbs and crushed garlic. Chill.
2. Make a slit in each monkfish fillet and pack with the chilled herb butter. Fold up to enclose the butter.
3. Toss each piece in seasoned flour, dip in beaten egg, and roll in breadcrumbs. Press the crumbs firmly onto the fish.
4. Place the fish in a buttered dish. Drizzle a little melted butter or oil and lemon juice on top.
5. Cook for 30-35 minutes at 375°F (190°C). Serve immediately.
